gpu.topology:
[4mGPU0	GPU1	GPU2	GPU3	CPU Affinity	NUMA Affinity	GPU NUMA ID[0m
GPU0	 X 	NV18	NV18	NV18	0-95	0		N/A
GPU1	NV18	 X 	NV18	NV18	0-95	0		N/A
GPU2	NV18	NV18	 X 	NV18	0-95	0		N/A
GPU3	NV18	NV18	NV18	 X 	0-95	0		N/A

Legend:

  X    = Self
  SYS  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the SMP interconnect between NUMA nodes (e.g., QPI/UPI)
  NODE = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the interconnect between PCIe Host Bridges within a NUMA node
  PHB  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as a PCIe Host Bridge (typically the CPU)
  PXB  = Connection traversing multiple PCIe bridges (without traversing the PCIe Host Bridge)
  PIX  = Connection traversing at most a single PCIe bridge
  NV#  = Connection traversing a bonded set of # NVLinks

eval_env:
# =============================================================================
# h100x4.env — H100 SXM 80GB x4 + Xeon Platinum 8480+ 1S/52C (KVM)
#              (TP=4, single NUMA node, 886GB RAM)
# =============================================================================

# --- Model ---
# TP=4 x 80GB = 320GB VRAM → 70B class models fit comfortably
MODEL=Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct
PORT=8000

# --- Server common ---
GPU_MEMORY_UTIL=0.9
TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE=4           # 4x H100 tensor parallel
TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1
HF_DATASETS_OFFLINE=1

# --- Benchmark ---
NUM_PROMPTS=2000
INPUT_LEN=512
OUTPUT_LEN=512
REQUEST_RATE=inf

# --- Hybrid settings ---
# Xeon 8480+: 1 socket, 52 cores, 104 threads (KVM VM, no AMX)
# AVX-512, AVX-512 VNNI, AVX-512 BF16 available
# 886GB total RAM, single NUMA node
# 72B BF16 모델 CPU 로드 시 ~140GB → 남은 ~746GB 중 KV cache 할당
# auto-detect: cpu_max_seqs~13 (52/4), kvcache~354GB (886*0.4), threads~52
HYBRID_CPU_MAX_SEQS=0            # auto-detect (~13)
HYBRID_CPU_KVCACHE_GB=0          # auto-detect (~354GB, 모델 140GB 제외 후)
HYBRID_CPU_THREADS=0             # auto-detect (~52 physical cores)
HYBRID_NUMA_AWARE=false          # Single socket / single NUMA node — no NUMA optimization
HYBRID_NUM_CPU_ENGINES=1         # Single NUMA node → single CPU engine
HYBRID_STATS_LOG_INTERVAL=50
# throughput-adaptive: CPU가 72B에서 느리면 자동으로 CPU 슬롯 축소
# + length-aware threshold 내장 → 긴 프롬프트는 GPU로 전송
HYBRID_ROUTING_STRATEGY=throughput-adaptive
HYBRID_CPU_PREFILL_THRESHOLD=256 # CPU prefill 10-50x 느림 → 짧은 프롬프트만 CPU로

# --- Model-specific options ---
EXTRA_SERVE_ARGS=""

# --- Monitoring ---
MONITOR_INTERVAL=1

# --- Results ---
RESULTS_DIR=results

# --- Server startup wait ---
SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT=600         # 72B model load takes longer
SERVER_READY_POLL=10
